    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="en">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0,maximum-scale=1.0"/>
    <title>Hidden Place — The Hang Out</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Abril+Fatface&family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@300;400;600;700&family=Courier+Prime:ital,wght@0,400;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
    <style>
    * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    :root {
    --bg: #0A0705;
    --card: rgba(14,9,5,0.94);
    --input-bg: rgba(22,14,8,0.97);
    --border: rgba(255,185,55,0.15);
    --border-hi: rgba(255,185,55,0.3);
    --gold: #E8A020;
    --red: #B83025;
    --red2: #E74C3C;
    --text: #F5EDD8;
    --muted: rgba(245,237,216,0.45);
    }
    html, body {
    min-height: 100vh;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    font-family: "Barlow Condensed", sans-serif;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    }
    /* Background image */
    #bg {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: 0;
    background: 9qxjis5UnYpQmug/L2kg3hWRhggDqKfJbjZ50DZRh9zPb2/wqm3myMWbknrU1vI0BAAypPK+/rTdNpXRKhLqhxiDBXQg5yCPT/PpUfk7pVYZySACK0Ge1lJcN5bnnp1pVW125dgW/ugH/CklVa0iyXyrdlaJPLd1Zt3fNZz/ALt5FBxk9RWzcvGwBUgnvgH/AAqg9v5hA3AL3ataNOr8TizKpUh0ZRVC5wg3HP8An6U/7PIBlmVM+9Xpd6J5VvGAo/iqqlmx3NIMt2Jrq5ajWxlzwXUiAPQEHHcd6Qg49ama3YDoR9KjQBl3qc5GRQ7jS0T6FgQIw25AOOBTDbsDwDkcEf1pwZMYLk8dxVxXgdVZ5AJMdMHn9K525o0XK+pTEZU5C9qd5ZIBDFT25qcyQbhtbHPbmmM6jgHIpe890D5V1EgmOdsgyTxu9abcRiI70AKHk47UMd3I4I71KBIE4XcrDpUtONmPmTKjgDGOTUq27lBJ5Zx2Yc04QuONvHpmrVuXhQhW2ZOSOxpVJu2gQ5b6joLNbpGUjDAckfw/WonsmjABGcY59RXX+Hrzw3/Z98dXby74J/o5jjbY3B6gZ+bOOuBz14rFvJLK7kZVm8mPru2k5PoBj9TXnxrT52raHW407bmbLMsZ8uMFmb0HJ/CopITGoe4faW5CL1q08qxMwtV25/5aNyT9KqeVhi2SX7sTya6YXb0MXOPcntpDvwiiMAYy3X/CtC61e8uoYrS4unaGMEopbKj6Vk73RNu3nNNLS8AKMdqHhnJ3aGq6itGEs+WZSBwSMZzVy008NEZ7mTy4cdN2C3tn+lZ/lSeaCRxkZ5qeaSS4b5xwvRM8D6VrOlOyjEzVSPUupdW6sEgjJjznP3c12Xge+0YXv/E5bzIYV/dxOflJ4A/IV58PM+8QSewq7ZXCW4kllb5wpCJgdTXHicFKUdNzoo4mMXqdX4on0n+0J5bWyDW7MdkZc7QvbnOcVy9zezzxkRhIIsYKoMZ/w/Cg3pdyXbcG9RVFmYMyrkqCMVOHws4KzRVXERk7oTegUBM8jtxililRXEki7gDwoOAfqaMK4IYfNn7wqB4XVjgb/Tt2rtVJvRnM6iRv22tTFY9sgCZwMDAFSXGqlNz+ZMzfKd/XntnP1Nc95cyoMLgj3q1I3nW7bshymNue9cksLFSN1idNytLeHzXKk7d33fapZzFd2uQwbGcHuDWf9luf7h/76H+NSRw3MbE7OvXkfn1rt9lFJWZze2vuUyxHB65pvQetWDZXBJJT/wAeH+NJ9huNv+r/APHh/jXXGpFIwbK4GPelETN1NWDZyxkZXj1pGhkyPlPNHM5bD0IvKRerGinG3kz90fnRRZhdH//Z") center bottom / cover no-repeat;
    }
    #bg::after {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom,
    #0A0705 0%,
    rgba(10,7,5,0.05) 15%,
    rgba(10,7,5,0.0) 35%,
    rgba(10,7,5,0.45) 62%,
    #0A0705 100%
    );
    }
    /* Page wrapper */
    #page {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    padding-bottom: 72px;
    }
    /* ── ONBOARDING SCREEN ── */
    #onboard {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: 200;
    background: rgba(10,7,5,0.97);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 24px;
    }
    .ob-box {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 310px;
    text-align: center;
    }
    .ob-logo { font-family: "Abril Fatface", serif; font-size: 26px; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 2px; }
    .ob-tag { font-family: "Courier Prime", monospace; font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 22px; }
    .ob-h { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 5px; }
    .ob-p { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 20px; line-height: 1.5; }
    .ob-row { margin-bottom: 14px; text-align: left; }
    .ob-lbl { display: block; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: .15em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 7px; font-family: "Courier Prime", monospace; }
    .ob-opts { display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .ob-opt { padding: 7px 12px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid var(--border-hi); background: transparent; color: var(--text); font-family: "Barlow Condensed", sans-serif; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: all .15s; }
    .ob-opt.sel { background: rgba(232,160,32,0.14); border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); }
    .ob-btn { width: 100%; padding: 14px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--red), #7a0000); border: none; border-radius: 10px; color: var(--text); font-family: "Barlow Condensed", sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; margin-top: 4px; }
    .ob-skip { display: block; margin-top: 11px; font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); font-family: "Courier Prime", monospace; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: underline; }
    .ob-phone-wrap { margin-top: 18px; padding-top: 16px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(232,160,32,0.15); }
    .ob-phone-msg { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); font-family: "Courier Prime", monospace; font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 10px; line-height: 1.6; text-align: left; }
    .ob-phone-msg strong { color: rgba(232,160,32,0.8); font-style: normal; }
    .ob-phone-input { width: 100%; background: var(--input-bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 9px; padding: 11px 13px; color: var(--text); font-family: "Barlow Condensed", sans-serif; font-size: 16px; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; }
    .ob-phone-input:focus { border-color: rgba(232,160,32,0.4); }
    .ob-phone-skip { display: block; text-align: center; font-size: 11px; color: rgba(232,160,32,0.4); font-family: "Courier Prime", monospace; cursor: pointer; margin-top: 7px; text-decoration: underline; }
    /* ── HOLDING SCREEN ── */
    #holding {
    width: 100%;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 40px 24px;
    }
    .hold-name { font-family: "Abril Fatface", serif; font-size: 40px; color: var(--gold); text-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(232,160,32,0.4); }
    .hold-tag { font-family: "Courier Prime", monospace; font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); font-style: italic; margin: 5px 0 32px; }
    .hold-msg { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 7px; }
    .hold-sub { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); font-family: "Courier Prime", monospace; }
    .hold-sync { margin-top: 30px; padding: 10px 22px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--border-hi); border-radius: 8px; color: var(--muted); font-family: "Barlow Condensed", sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; }
    /* ── LIVE APP ── */
    #app {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 420px;
    padding: 0 14px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: stretch;
    }
    /* Hero */
    .hero {
    width: 100%;
    height: 65vw;
    max-height: 340px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    padding-bottom: 16px;
    text-align: center;
    }
    .venue-name { font-family: "Abril Fatface", serif; font-size: 36px; color: var(--gold); text-shadow: 0 2px 18px rgba(232,160,32,0.5); }
    .venue-tag { font-family: "Courier Prime", monospace; font-size: 13px; color: rgba(245,237,216,0.7); font-style: italic; margin-top: 4px; }
    .dj-name { font-family: "Barlow Condensed", sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--gold); letter-spacing: .05em; margin-top: 6px; min-height: 20px; text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(232,160,32,0.4); }
    .genres { display: flex; gap: 5px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 7px; }
    .genre { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: .12em; text-transform: uppercase; border: 1px solid rgba(184,48,37,0.6); color: rgba(231,76,60,1); padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 4px; background: rgba(184,48,37,0.12); }
    /* Now Playing */
    .np-card { overflow:visible;
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid rgba(184,48,37,0.28);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 12px 14px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: visible;
    }
    .np-card::before { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(231,76,60,0.5), transparent); }
    .np-top { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
    .np-eq { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; height: 14px; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .np-bar { width: 3px; border-radius: 2px; background: var(--red2); animation: eq .6s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .np-bar:nth-child(1) { height: 6px; }
    .np-bar:nth-child(2) { height: 13px; animation-delay: .15s; }
    .np-bar:nth-child(3) { height: 8px; animation-delay: .3s; }
    @keyframes eq { 0%,100%{transform:scaleY(1)} 50%{transform:scaleY(1.6)} }
    .np-label { font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: .18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(231,76,60,0.75); font-family: "Courier Prime", monospace; }
    .np-song { font-family: "Abril Fatface", serif; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.1; }
    .np-artist { font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); font-family: "Courier Prime", monospace; margin-top: 1px; }
    .react-row { display: flex; gap: 0; justify-content: space-around; padding: 8px 0 4px; }
    .react-btn { position: relative; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 6px 16px; outline: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; overflow: visible; }
    .react-btn .react-emoji { font-size: 38px; line-height: 1; display: block; transition: transform 0.1s; }
    .react-btn.lit .react-emoji { filter: grayscale(0); }
    .react-btn .count { font-family: "Barlow Condensed", sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: rgba(245,237,216,0.35); transition: color 0.2s; }
    .react-btn.fire.lit .count { color: rgba(255,130,0,0.8); }
    .react-btn.love.lit .count { color: rgba(231,76,60,0.8); }
    .react-btn.meh.lit .count { color: rgba(180,180,180,0.7); }
    /* Big request button */
    .req-btn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 15px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7a0000, var(--red));
    border: none;
    border-radius: 12px;
    color: var(--text);
    font-family: "Barlow Condensed", sans-serif;
    font-size: 17px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: .14em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 8px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(184,48,37,0.3);
    }
    .req-btn svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; fill: var(--gold); }
    /* Request panel */
    .req-panel {
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border-hi);
    border-radius: 13px;
    padding: 14px;
    margin-top: 9px;
    display: none;
    position: relative;
    overflow: visible;
    }
    .req-panel.open { display: block; }
    .req-panel::before { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--gold), transparent); }
    .panel-title { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: .15em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 10px; font-family: "Courier Prime", monospace; }
    /* Cards */
    .card-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .req-card { border-radius: 10px; padding: 11px; border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    /* Loading state */
    .loading-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
    .vinyl { width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle, #1a1a1a 30%, #111 70%); border: 1px solid rgba(232,160,32,0.22); animation: spin 1.2s linear infinite; flex-shrink: 0; position: relative; }
    .vinyl::before { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--gold); transform: translate(-50%,-50%); }
    @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
    .loading-text { font-family: "Courier Prime", monospace; font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); }
    .loading-song { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(245,237,216,0.5); margin-top: 3px; font-style: italic; }
    /* Response card */
    .card-head { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 5px; }
    .card-icon { font-size: 18px; width: 24px; text-align: center; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .card-title { font-family: "Abril Fatface", serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1; }
    .card-sub { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase; font-family: "Courier Prime", monospace; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 1px; }
    .card-song { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.2); border-radius: 5px; padding: 6px 8px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .card-msg { font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); font-family: "Courier Prime", monospace; line-height: 1.5; font-style: italic; }
    /* Another button */
    .another-btn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 11px;
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid var(--border-hi);
    border-radius: 9px;
    color: var(--text);
    font-family: "Barlow Condensed", sans-serif;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: .07em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    }
    /* Input */
    .input-wrap { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 5px; }
    /* ── Song autocomplete dropdown ── */
    .autocomplete-wrap { position: relative; overflow: visible; z-index: 9999; }
    .autocomplete-list { display:none !important; /* removed */ position: fixed; background: #1A1820; border: 1px solid rgba(232,160,32,0.4); border-radius: 10px; z-index: 99999; overflow-y: auto; max-height: 240px; box-shadow: 0 -4px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.9); }
    .ac-item { padding: 10px 12px; cursor: pointer; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); transition: background 0.1s; }
    .ac-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
    .ac-item:hover, .ac-item.selected { background: rgba(232,160,32,0.1); }
    .ac-title { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--fg); }
    .ac-artist { font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); font-family: "Courier Prime", monospace; margin-top: 1px; }
    .ac-loading { padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); font-family: "Courier Prime", monospace; }
    .song-input {
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--input-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 9px;
    padding: 12px 44px 12px 13px;
    color: var(--text);
    font-family: "Barlow Condensed", sans-serif;
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 500;
    outline: none;
    }
    .song-input::placeholder { color: rgba(245,237,216,0.17); }
    .song-input:focus { border-color: rgba(232,160,32,0.4); }
    .send-btn {
    position: absolute;
    right: 6px;
    width: 32px;
    height: 32px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--red), #7a0000);
    border: none;
    border-radius: 6px;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    }
    .send-btn svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; fill: white; }
    .cancel-link { display: block; text-align: center; font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); font-family: "Courier Prime", monospace; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: underline; padding: 2px 0; }
    .resync-link { display: block; text-align: center; font-size: 13px; color: rgba(232,160,32,0.6); font-family: "Barlow Condensed", sans-serif; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: .08em; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: underline; margin-top: 20px; text-transform: uppercase; }
    /* Ticker */
    #ticker {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    background: rgba(10,7,5,0.97);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 9px 16px;
    z-index: 20;
    }
    .ticker-inner { max-width: 420px; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; }
    .ticker-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--red2); animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; flex-shrink: 0; }
    @keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:.3} }
    .ticker-text { font-family: "Courier Prime", monospace; font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }
    .ticker-text b { color: var(--text); }
    /* ── REACTION ANIMATIONS ── */
    20% { transform:scale(2) rotate(-15deg); filter:brightness(2); }
    50% { transform:scale(1.5) rotate(10deg); }
    75% { transform:scale(1.7) rotate(-5deg); filter:brightness(1.3); }
    100% { transform:scale(1) rotate(0); filter:brightness(1); }
    }
    15% { transform:scale(0.7); }
    40% { transform:scale(2.1); filter:drop-shadow(0 0 14px rgba(231,76,60,0.9)); }
    65% { transform:scale(0.85); }
    85% { transform:scale(1.2); }
    100% { transform:scale(1); filter:none; }
    }
    12% { transform:translateX(-10px) rotate(-10deg) scale(1.2); }
    28% { transform:translateX(10px) rotate(10deg) scale(1.2); }
    44% { transform:translateX(-7px) rotate(-6deg); }
    60% { transform:translateX(7px) rotate(6deg); }
    76% { transform:translateX(-3px) rotate(-2deg); }
    88% { transform:translateX(3px) rotate(2deg); }
    }
    33% { transform:scale(1.08) rotate(2deg); }
    66% { transform:scale(1.04) rotate(-1deg); }
    }
    20% { transform:scale(1.15); }
    40% { transform:scale(0.95); }
    60% { transform:scale(1.1); }
    }
    50% { transform:translateY(-4px); }
    }
    60% { opacity:1; transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(-18px); }
    100% { opacity:0; transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(-32px); }
    }
    100% { transform:translateX(-50%) translate(var(--tx),var(--ty)) scale(0); opacity:0; }
    }
    .react-btn.fire.lit .react-emoji { animation:fireIdle 2s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .react-btn.love.lit .react-emoji { animation:heartIdle 1.4s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .react-btn.meh.lit .react-emoji { animation:mehIdle 2.4s ease-in-out infinite; }
    /* ── CSS Animated Flame ── */
    .css-flame {
    display:inline-block; width:34px; height:42px;
    position:relative; margin-bottom:2px;
    }
    .flame {
    position:absolute; bottom:0; border-radius:50% 50% 20% 20%;
    animation:flicker 0.9s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
    transform-origin:bottom center;
    }
    .f1 {
    width:22px; height:32px; left:6px;
    background:linear-gradient(to top,#FF4500,#FF8C00,#FFD700);
    animation-duration:0.8s;
    }
    .f2 {
    width:16px; height:26px; left:9px;
    background:linear-gradient(to top,#FF6B00,#FFB300,#FFF176);
    animation-duration:0.65s; animation-delay:0.1s;
    }
    .f3 {
    width:10px; height:18px; left:12px;
    background:linear-gradient(to top,#FFD700,#FFFDE7);
    animation-duration:0.5s; animation-delay:0.2s;
    }
    @keyframes flicker {
    0% { transform:scaleX(1) scaleY(1) rotate(-1deg); }
    25% { transform:scaleX(0.92) scaleY(1.04) rotate(1deg); }
    50% { transform:scaleX(1.06) scaleY(0.97) rotate(-2deg); }
    75% { transform:scaleX(0.95) scaleY(1.06) rotate(1deg); }
    100% { transform:scaleX(1.04) scaleY(0.95) rotate(-1deg); }
    }
    /* Tap burst for CSS flame */
    25% { transform:scale(2.2) rotate(-10deg); filter:brightness(2); }
    60% { transform:scale(1.5) rotate(8deg); }
    100% { transform:scale(1) rotate(0); filter:none; }
    }
    /* Red heart */
    /* === REACTION ANIMATIONS === */
    @keyframes fireTap {
    0% { transform: scale(1) rotate(0); }
    25% { transform: scale(2.0) rotate(-12deg); filter: brightness(1.8); }
    55% { transform: scale(1.4) rotate(8deg); }
    80% { transform: scale(1.1) rotate(-3deg); }
    100% { transform: scale(1) rotate(0); filter: none; }
    }
    50% { transform: scale(1.08) rotate(1deg); }
    }
    @keyframes heartTap {
    0% { transform: scale(1); }
    20% { transform: scale(0.75); }
    50% { transform: scale(1.85); filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px #E53935); }
    75% { transform: scale(0.92); }
    100% { transform: scale(1); filter: none; }
    }
    @keyframes heartIdle {
    0%,100% { transform: scale(1); }
    15% { transform: scale(1.18); }
    30% { transform: scale(1.0); }
    45% { transform: scale(1.12); }
    60% { transform: scale(1.0); }
    }
    @keyframes mehTap {
    0%,100% { transform: rotate(0); }
    15% { transform: translateX(-9px) rotate(-8deg) scale(1.15); }
    30% { transform: translateX(9px) rotate(8deg) scale(1.15); }
    50% { transform: translateX(-6px) rotate(-5deg); }
    70% { transform: translateX(6px) rotate(5deg); }
    85% { transform: translateX(-2px); }
    }
    @keyframes mehIdle {
    0%,100% { transform: translateY(0); }
    50% { transform: translateY(-4px); }
    }
    @keyframes particleBurst {
    0% { transform: translateX(-50%) translate(0,0) scale(1); opacity: 1; }
    100% { transform: translateX(-50%) translate(var(--tx), var(--ty)) scale(0); opacity: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes toastFade {
    0% { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }
    65% { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-16px); }
    100% { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-28px); }
    }
    /* idle when lit */
    .react-btn.fire.lit .react-emoji { animation: fireIdle 1.4s ease-in-out infinite; }
    @keyframes fireIdle {
    0%,100% { transform: scale(1) rotate(-1deg); filter: brightness(1); }
    25% { transform: scale(1.1) rotate(1deg); filter: brightness(1.3) saturate(1.5); }
    50% { transform: scale(0.95) rotate(-2deg); }
    75% { transform: scale(1.08) rotate(2deg); filter: brightness(1.2); }
    }
    .react-btn.fire.lit.fire-anim .react-emoji { animation: fireTap 0.5s ease-out forwards !important; }
    .react-btn.love.lit .react-emoji { animation: heartIdle 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .react-btn.meh.lit .react-emoji { animation: mehIdle 2s ease-in-out infinite; }
    /* tap */
    .react-btn.heart-anim .react-emoji { animation: heartTap 0.5s ease-out forwards !important; }
    .react-btn.meh-anim .react-emoji { animation: mehTap 0.5s ease-out forwards !important; }
    /* particles & toast */
    .react-particle {
    position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%;
    font-size: 13px; pointer-events: none; z-index: 50;
    animation: particleBurst 0.7s ease-out forwards;
    }
    .react-toast {
    position: absolute; bottom: 115%; left: 50%;
    background: rgba(8,7,10,0.88); color: #F0EDE8;
    font-size: 12px; font-family: "Barlow Condensed", sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .07em; text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 20px; white-space: nowrap;
    pointer-events: none; z-index: 60;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    animation: toastFade 1.8s ease-out forwards;
    }
    /* Fire burst particles */
    @keyframes flamePuff {
    0% { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0) scale(1); opacity: 1; }
    100% { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-35px) scale(0); opacity: 0; }
    }
    .fire-puff {
    position: absolute; bottom: 80%; left: 50%;
    font-size: 12px; pointer-events: none; z-index: 20;
    animation: flamePuff 0.6s ease-out forwards;
    }
    /* === END REACTION ANIMATIONS === */
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <div id="bg"></div>
    <!-- ONBOARDING -->
    <div id="onboard">
    <div class="ob-box">
    <div class="ob-logo">Hidden Place — The Hang Out</div>
    <div class="ob-tag">Balewadi High Street</div>
    <div class="ob-h">Quick intro</div>
    <div class="ob-p">Totally optional — helps us build a better night.</div>
    <div class="ob-row">
    <span class="ob-lbl">Age range</span>
    <div class="ob-opts">
    <button class="ob-opt" data-key="age" data-val="18-24">18-24</button>
    <button class="ob-opt" data-key="age" data-val="25-34">25-34</button>
    <button class="ob-opt" data-key="age" data-val="35-44">35-44</button>
    <button class="ob-opt" data-key="age" data-val="45+">45+</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ob-row">
    <span class="ob-lbl">How you identify</span>
    <div class="ob-opts">
    <button class="ob-opt" data-key="gender" data-val="male">Male</button>
    <button class="ob-opt" data-key="gender" data-val="female">Female</button>
    <button class="ob-opt" data-key="gender" data-val="nonbinary">Non-binary</button>
    <button class="ob-opt" data-key="gender" data-val="prefer-not">Prefer not</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ob-phone-wrap">
    <div class="ob-phone-msg">🎸 <strong>Stay in the loop.</strong><br>Drop your number — we'll only text when it's worth opening.</div>
    <input class="ob-phone-input" id="ob-phone" type="tel" placeholder="+91 98765 43210" maxlength="15"/>
    <span class="ob-phone-skip" onclick="document.getElementById('ob-phone').value=''">Maybe later</span>
    </div>
    <button class="ob-btn" id="ob-go">Let's Go ⚡</button>
    <span class="ob-skip" id="ob-skip">Skip everything</span>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- PAGE -->
    <div id="page" style="display:none">
    <!-- HOLDING -->
    <div id="holding">
    <div class="hold-name">Hidden Place — The Hang Out</div>
    <div class="hold-tag">Balewadi High Street</div>
    <div class="hold-msg" id="hold-msg-text">DJ starts soon 🎸</div>
    <div class="hold-sub" id="hold-sub-text">Requests open when the session goes live.</div>
    <button class="hold-sync" id="hold-sync">↻ DJ already live? Tap here</button>
    </div>
    <!-- SESSION ENDED -->
    <div id="ended" style="display:none">
    <div class="hold-name">Hidden Place — The Hang Out</div>
    <div class="hold-tag">Balewadi High Street</div>
    <div style="font-size:40px;margin:16px 0" id="ended-icon">🎸</div>
    <div class="hold-msg" id="ended-msg">That's a wrap for tonight!</div>
    <div class="hold-sub" id="ended-sub" style="margin-top:8px;line-height:1.8">Thanks for being part of the night.<br>See you next time at Hidden Place.</div>
    </div>
    <!-- LIVE APP -->
    <div id="app" style="display:none">
    <div class="hero">
    <div class="venue-name">Hidden Place — The Hang Out</div>
    <div class="venue-tag">Balewadi High Street</div>
    <div class="dj-name" id="dj-name"></div>
    <div class="genres">
    <span class="genre">Rock</span>
    <span class="genre">Retro</span>
    <span class="genre">Pop</span>
    <span class="genre">Metal</span>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Now Playing -->
    <div class="np-card">
    <div class="np-top">
    <div class="np-eq">
    <div class="np-bar"></div>
    <div class="np-bar"></div>
    <div class="np-bar"></div>
    </div>
    <div>
    <div class="np-label">Now Playing</div>
    <div class="np-song" id="np-song">Waiting for DJ...</div>
    <div id="np-dedication" style="font-size:12px;color:rgba(232,160,32,0.7);font-family:'Courier Prime',monospace;margin-top:2px;min-height:16px"></div>
    <div class="np-artist" id="np-artist"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="react-row">
    <button class="react-btn fire" id="rb-fire" onclick="react('fire')"><span class="react-emoji">🔥</span> <span class="count" id="rc-fire">0</span></button>
    <button class="react-btn love" id="rb-love" onclick="react('love')"><span class="react-emoji">❤️</span> <span class="count" id="rc-love">0</span></button>
    <button class="react-btn meh" id="rb-meh" onclick="react('meh')"><span class="react-emoji">😐</span> <span class="count" id="rc-meh">0</span></button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Request button — hidden once panel opens -->
    <button class="req-btn" id="req-btn" onclick="openPanel()">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 3v10.55c-.59-.34-1.27-.55-2-.55-2.21 0-4 1.79-4 4s1.79 4 4 4 4-1.79 4-4V7h4V3h-6z"/></svg>
    Request a Song
    </button>
    <!-- Request panel -->
    <div class="req-panel" id="req-panel">
    <div class="panel-title">Your Requests Tonight</div>
    <div class="card-list" id="card-list"></div>
    <!-- "Request another" button — shown after a card is sent and input is hidden -->
    <button class="another-btn" id="another-btn" style="display:none" onclick="showInput()">
    + Request another · <span id="rem-count">4</span> left tonight
    </button>
    <!-- Input -->
    <div id="input-area">
    <div class="input-wrap autocomplete-wrap">
    <input class="song-input" id="song-input" type="text" placeholder="Song or artist name..." autocomplete="off" spellcheck="false"/>
    <div class="autocomplete-list" id="ac-list" style="display:none"></div>
    <input id="dedication-input"
    style="width:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 12px;color:rgba(245,237,216,0.7);font-size:13px;font-family:'Courier Prime',monospace;margin-bottom:8px;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box"
    placeholder="Dedicate to someone? Add a note... (optional)" maxlength="80"/>
    <button class="send-btn" id="send-btn">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M2.01 21L23 12 2.01 3 2 10l15 2-15 2z"/></svg>
    </button>
    </div>
    <span class="cancel-link" id="cancel-link" style="display:none" onclick="hideInput()">Cancel</span>
    </div>
    </div>
    <span class="resync-link" onclick="location.reload()">Wrong session? Tap to resync</span>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Ticker -->
    <div id="ticker" style="display:none">
    <div class="ticker-inner">
    <div class="ticker-dot"></div>
    <div class="ticker-text">Now playing: <b id="ticker-song">—</b></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <script type="module">
    import { initializeApp } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.7.1/firebase-app.js";
    import { getFirestore, collection, addDoc, onSnapshot,
    doc, updateDoc, query, where, serverTimestamp, increment }
    from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.7.1/firebase-firestore.js";
    // ── Firebase ──
    const db = getFirestore(initializeApp({apiKey:"AIzaSyAqBkxofG2zyJSpKYFUG4OnNBANjrc-Qok",authDomain:"vtest-c064b.firebaseapp.com",projectId:"vtest-c064b",storageBucket:"vtest-c064b.firebasestorage.app",messagingSenderId:"226302770597",appId:"1:226302770597:web:f44a2180ee937f8a727c4c"}));
    const VENUE = new URLSearchParams(location.search).get("venue") || "hidden-place";
    const TABLE = new URLSearchParams(location.search).get("table") || "?";
    const MAX = 5;
    // ── State ──
    let guest = {};
    let sid = null; // current live session ID
    let djName = "";
    let myReact = null;
    let nowSong = "";
    let sending = false;
    // ── Onboarding ──
    document.querySelectorAll(".ob-opt").forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
    document.querySelectorAll(`.ob-opt[data-key="${btn.dataset.key}"]`).forEach(b => b.classList.remove("sel"));
    btn.classList.add("sel");
    guest[btn.dataset.key] = btn.dataset.val;
    });
    });
    const SHEET_WEBHOOK = "https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbzHEWhnce2LyqAGewPRCAgVd02v6kpSo0m3DDJVOdELOkPFimvjy3bwBkt5EpYYYg/exec";
    function finishOnboard() {
    const phone = (document.getElementById("ob-phone")?.value || "").trim();
    if (phone && phone.length >= 8) guest.phone = phone;
    // Save under vins_user_info (controls first-time onboarding logic)
    localStorage.setItem("vins_user_info", JSON.stringify(guest));
    localStorage.setItem("vins_seen_at", Date.now().toString());
    // Also keep hp_guest for backwards compat with request storage
    localStorage.setItem("hp_guest", JSON.stringify(guest));
    // Send to Google Sheet if phone provided
    if (phone && phone.length >= 8) {
    fetch(SHEET_WEBHOOK, {
    method: "POST", mode: "no-cors",
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    body: JSON.stringify({
    phone,
    venue: VENUE,
    table: TABLE,
    age: guest.age || "—",
    gender: guest.gender || "—",
    song: "—",
    sessionId: "onboard"
    })
    }).catch(() => {});
    }
    document.getElementById("onboard").style.display = "none";
    document.getElementById("page").style.display = "";
    startFirebase();
    }
    document.getElementById("ob-go").addEventListener("click", finishOnboard);
    document.getElementById("ob-skip").addEventListener("click", () => {
    localStorage.setItem("vins_user_info", "skipped");
    localStorage.setItem("vins_seen_at", Date.now().toString());
    localStorage.setItem("hp_guest", JSON.stringify(guest));
    document.getElementById("onboard").style.display = "none";
    document.getElementById("page").style.display = "";
    startFirebase();
    });
    document.getElementById("hold-sync").addEventListener("click", () => location.reload());
    // ── Firebase listeners ──
    function startFirebase() {
    // Sessions — query by venueId only, check isLive client-side (no composite index needed)
    onSnapshot(
    query(collection(db, "sessions"), where("venueId", "==", VENUE)),
    snap => {
    const twelveHoursAgo = Date.now() / 1000 - (12 * 60 * 60);
    const liveSessions = snap.docs
    .map(d => ({ id: d.id, ...d.data() }))
    .filter(s => s.isLive === true && (s.createdAt?.seconds || 0) > twelveHoursAgo)
    .sort((a, b) => (b.createdAt?.seconds || 0) - (a.createdAt?.seconds || 0));
    const liveDoc = liveSessions[0]; // most recently started session within last 12 hours
    if (liveDoc) {
    const newSid = liveDoc.id;
    const newDj = liveDoc.djName || "";
    sid = newSid;
    djName = newDj;
    document.getElementById("dj-name").textContent = newDj ? "Tonight with DJ " + newDj : "";
    showApp();
    } else {
    sid = null;
    djName = "";
    showHolding();
    }
    },
    err => console.error("Session listener error:", err.code, err.message)
    );
    // Now Playing
    onSnapshot(
    doc(db, "nowplaying", VENUE),
    snap => {
    if (!snap.exists()) return;
    const d = snap.data();
    // Only show Now Playing if it belongs to the CURRENT session
    // Prevents last nights song showing when guest returns
    if (d.sessionId && d.sessionId !== sid) {
    document.getElementById("np-song").textContent = "Waiting for DJ...";
    document.getElementById("np-artist").textContent = "";
    document.getElementById("ticker-song").textContent = "—";
    return;
    }
    const prevSong = nowSong;
    nowSong = d.song || "";
    document.getElementById("np-song").textContent = d.song || "Waiting for DJ...";
    document.getElementById("np-artist").textContent = d.artist || "";
    // Show dedication if this song was dedicated
    const dedEl = document.getElementById("np-dedication");
    if (dedEl) {
    if (d.dedication) {
    dedEl.textContent = "🎵 Dedicated to " + d.dedication;
    dedEl.style.display = "";
    } else {
    dedEl.textContent = "";
    dedEl.style.display = "none";
    }
    }
    document.getElementById("ticker-song").textContent = d.artist
    ? d.song + " — " + d.artist
    : d.song || "—";
    const r = d.reactions || {};
    document.getElementById("rc-fire").textContent = r.fire || 0;
    document.getElementById("rc-love").textContent = r.love || 0;
    document.getElementById("rc-meh").textContent = r.meh || 0;
    // Cheer fires when DJ clicks gold button — flip matching accepted OR later cards
    if (d.cheer && d.song) {
    const reqs = loadRequests();
    const songLower = d.song.toLowerCase().trim();
    let matched = false;
    reqs.forEach(r => {
    if (r.status !== "accepted" && r.status !== "later") return;
    const queryLower = (r.song || "").toLowerCase().trim();
    const exact = songLower === queryLower;
    const contains = songLower.includes(queryLower) || queryLower.includes(songLower);
    const wordHit = queryLower.split(" ").filter(w => w.length > 2)
    .some(word => songLower.includes(word));
    if (exact || contains || wordHit) {
    matched = true;
    const cardEl = document.getElementById(r.id);
    const cardId = cardEl ? cardEl.id : r.id;
    const playedTime = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('en-IN',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit',hour12:true});
    renderCard(cardId, r.song, "nowplaying", null, null, r.dedication || null, playedTime);
    // Persist playedAt so it survives refresh
    const _arr = loadRequests();
    const _pi = _arr.findIndex(x => x.id === cardId || x.id === r.id);
    if (_pi >= 0) { _arr[_pi].playedAt = playedTime; saveRequests(_arr); }
    const arr = loadRequests();
    const idx = arr.findIndex(x => x.id === r.id);
    if (idx >= 0) {
    arr[idx].status = "nowplaying";
    // dedication already stored — keep it
    saveRequests(arr);
    // Also store the stable message for this nowplaying card
    const msgKey = "vm_" + cardId + "_nowplaying";
    if (!localStorage.getItem(msgKey)) {
    const el = document.getElementById(cardId);
    const inner = el && el.querySelector("[data-msg]");
    if (inner) localStorage.setItem(msgKey, inner.getAttribute("data-msg") || "");
    }
    }
    }
    });
    // If no match — show playing animation on ALL accepted/later cards
    // Guest should always feel the cheer when DJ hits the gold button
    if (!matched) {
    reqs.filter(r => r.status === "accepted" || r.status === "later").forEach(r => {
    const cardEl = document.getElementById(r.id);
    if (!cardEl) return;
    // Add jitter + EQ animation without changing the card status
    cardEl.style.transition = "box-shadow 0.3s";
    cardEl.style.boxShadow = "0 0 20px rgba(255,208,96,0.5)";
    cardEl.style.animation = "cardJitter 0.4s ease-in-out";
    setTimeout(() => { cardEl.style.boxShadow = ""; cardEl.style.animation = ""; }, 1500);
    });
    }
    }
    },
    err => console.warn("NP listener:", err.message)
    );
    }
    // ── Reactions ──
    // ── Reactions ──
    const reactionToasts = {
    fire: ["On fire! 🔥", "Lit!", "Burning up!", "Fired up!"],
    love: ["Love received! ❤️", "Feeling the love!", "Pure love!", "Sent with love!"],
    meh: ["Noted 😐", "Fair enough.", "Duly noted.", "Message received."]
    };
    window.react = type => {
    if (!nowSong) return;
    if (myReact === type) return;
    if (myReact) document.getElementById("rb-" + myReact)?.classList.remove("lit");
    myReact = type;
    const btn = document.getElementById("rb-" + type);
    if (!btn) return;
    btn.classList.add("lit");
    // Trigger tap animation
    const animClass = { fire:"fire-anim", love:"heart-anim", meh:"meh-anim" }[type];
    btn.classList.remove(animClass);
    void btn.offsetWidth;
    btn.classList.add(animClass);
    setTimeout(() => btn.classList.remove(animClass), 600);
    // Particles burst radially outward
    const particleMap = { fire:["🔥","🔥","⚡"], love:["❤️","❤️","✨"], meh:["💨","•","💭"] };
    const particles = particleMap[type];
    for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
    const p = document.createElement("span");
    p.className = "react-particle";
    p.textContent = particles[i % particles.length];
    const angle = (i / 6) * 360 + Math.random() * 20;
    const dist = 35 + Math.random() * 20;
    const rad = angle * Math.PI / 180;
    p.style.setProperty("--tx", (Math.cos(rad) * dist) + "px");
    p.style.setProperty("--ty", (Math.sin(rad) * dist) + "px");
    p.style.top = "50%";
    p.style.animationDelay = (i * 0.04) + "s";
    p.style.fontSize = (11 + Math.random() * 6) + "px";
    btn.appendChild(p);
    setTimeout(() => p.remove(), 850);
    }
    // Float-up toast
    const msgs = reactionToasts[type];
    const msg = msgs[Math.floor(Math.random() * msgs.length)];
    const t = document.createElement("div");
    t.className = "react-toast";
    t.textContent = msg;
    btn.appendChild(t);
    setTimeout(() => t.remove(), 1800);
    // Counter pop
    const countEl = btn.querySelector(".count");
    if (countEl) {
    countEl.style.transition = "transform 0.15s, color 0.15s";
    countEl.style.transform = "scale(1.6)";
    countEl.style.color = type==="fire"?"#FF6B35":type==="love"?"#E74C3C":"#aaa";
    setTimeout(() => { countEl.style.transform="scale(1)"; countEl.style.color=""; }, 250);
    }
    // Start periodic fire puffs when fire is lit
    if (type === "fire") {
    startFirePuffs();
    }
    addDoc(collection(db, "reactions"), {
    venueId: VENUE, sessionId: sid, songName: nowSong,
    type, tableNumber: TABLE,
    guestAge: guest.age || null, guestGender: guest.gender || null,
    timestamp: serverTimestamp()
    }).catch(console.error);
    updateDoc(doc(db, "nowplaying", VENUE), { ["reactions." + type]: increment(1) }).catch(() => {});
    };
    let fireInterval = null;
    function startFirePuffs() {
    if (fireInterval) return;
    const btn = document.getElementById("rb-fire");
    fireInterval = setInterval(() => {
    if (myReact !== "fire") { clearInterval(fireInterval); fireInterval = null; return; }
    const puff = document.createElement("span");
    puff.className = "fire-puff";
    puff.textContent = ["🔥","✨","⚡"][Math.floor(Math.random()*3)];
    puff.style.left = (30 + Math.random() * 40) + "%";
    btn.appendChild(puff);
    setTimeout(() => puff.remove(), 650);
    }, 400);
    }
    // ── Request storage — strictly keyed to session ID ──
    // If sid is null, returns empty — never reads stale data
    function storageKey() { return sid ? "hp_req_" + sid : null; }
    function loadRequests(){ const k = storageKey(); return k ? JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(k) || "[]") : []; }
    function saveRequests(arr) { const k = storageKey(); if (k) localStorage.setItem(k, JSON.stringify(arr)); }
    function remaining() { return Math.max(0, MAX - loadRequests().length); }
    // ── Panel open/close ──
    window.openPanel = () => {
    document.getElementById("req-btn").style.display = "none";
    document.getElementById("req-panel").classList.add("open");
    document.getElementById("input-area").style.display = "";
    document.getElementById("cancel-link").style.display = "none";
    document.getElementById("another-btn").style.display = "none";
    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById("song-input").focus(), 100);
    };
    window.showInput = () => {
    document.getElementById("input-area").style.display = "";
    document.getElementById("cancel-link").style.display = "block";
    document.getElementById("another-btn").style.display = "none";
    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById("song-input").focus(), 80);
    };
    window.hideInput = () => {
    document.getElementById("input-area").style.display = "none";
    document.getElementById("cancel-link").style.display = "none";
    refreshAnotherBtn();
    };
    function refreshAnotherBtn() {
    const rem = remaining();
    const inputShown = document.getElementById("input-area").style.display !== "none";
    const btn = document.getElementById("another-btn");
    const sp = document.getElementById("rem-count");
    if (rem > 0 && !inputShown) {
    btn.style.display = "";
    if (sp) sp.textContent = rem;
    } else {
    btn.style.display = "none";
    }
    }
    // ── Send ──
    // ── Autocomplete ──
    let acTimeout = null;
    let acSelected = -1;
    let acResults = [];
    document.getElementById("song-input").addEventListener("input", () => {
    const val = document.getElementById("song-input").value.trim();
    if (val.length < 2) { hideAC(); return; }
    // autocomplete removed
    });
    document.getElementById("song-input").addEventListener("keydown", e => {
    const list = document.getElementById("ac-list");
    if (list.style.display !== "none" && acResults.length) {
    if (e.key === "ArrowDown") {
    e.preventDefault();
    acSelected = Math.min(acSelected + 1, acResults.length - 1);
    renderAC();
    return;
    }
    if (e.key === "ArrowUp") {
    e.preventDefault();
    acSelected = Math.max(acSelected - 1, -1);
    renderAC();
    return;
    }
    if (e.key === "Enter" && acSelected >= 0) {
    e.preventDefault();
    selectAC(acSelected);
    return;
    }
    if (e.key === "Escape") { hideAC(); return; }
    }
    });
    document.addEventListener("click", e => {
    if (window._acSelecting) return;
    if (!e.target.closest(".autocomplete-wrap") && !e.target.closest(".autocomplete-list")) hideAC();
    });
    View remainder of file in raw view
